Week 1 | Knowledge Check: Spot the Errors

Spot the Errors!
Instructions
Can you spot the errors in each example? Click on the plus sign (+) to extend the sections to check your answers!



After you finish the Knowledge Check, click Next to continue to It's All in the Process.

Week 1 | It's All in the Process

Crafting Your Story
Whether you are a professional writer or just starting writing, having a structured writing process can make all the difference in producing quality content. In this lecture, we will look at the steps that can help you turn your ideas into well-crafted pieces of work. So, grab your favorite pen and notebook (or open up that blank document on your screen), and let's get started!



After you finish this page, click Next to continue to The Writing Process.

Week 1 | The Writing Process

Words in Progress: Unraveling the Writer's Process
Some people find writing intimidating. By breaking down the process into these five steps, we can remove some of the mystery and angst of writing. Click on each of the numbers below to review.
